note: Spec-only naming layer over existing ugk/scale machinery. G2 routes no work, adds no ugk/ object. Each symbol is verified present in the current tree by the gate (handles methods, dataclass fields, and module constants).

progress_events.doc: Scheduler control operations emitted over the CLOSED SCALE_OPS vocabulary.

timeout_handling.doc: G2 mapping (ratified Q1): 'timeout handling' = the existing bounded-execution / backpressure refusal path. WALL-CLOCK TIMEOUT IS NOT YET A SEPARATE SERVICE and is NOT invented here; a distinct wall-clock timeout would be a later, separately-authorized addition and must not leak time into receipt determinism (Receipt Identity Principle).

evidence_capture.doc: Reconstruct the decision trail for a candidate from receipts alone ('answer why from the log').

result_hashing.doc: Receipt hash minted at chain append (scale.Receipt.rhash is a dataclass field; I5Receipt.rhash() is the method form).

receipt_emission.doc: NBER-1: receipt appended to the chain BEFORE the effect runs.

result_envelope_assembly.doc: commit_and_effect returns (receipt, effect_result); the effect_result is the 'what happened' envelope payload, distinct from the receipt.

lineage_tracking.doc: Append-only chain: tip, prior_hash link, canonical position, produced effects.

summary_verdict_reporting.doc: schedule() returns the committed (cand_id, rhash) list; I5Log.all() is the full decision log.

authority_boundary.rule: Named services SCHEDULE and OBSERVE only. No named service is a posture/authority op; the emitted-ops vocabulary is exactly the existing closed SCALE_OPS. Being named grants the substrate no constitutional authority.

nber1_site.rule: chain.append (receipt durable) MUST occur before effect_fn (effect). G2 records this existing ordering; it does not implement it.
